name: LG Soundbar for TV with Dolby Atmos 7.1.3 channel S90TR

gallery.a: Angled view of LG Soundbar S90TR, subwoofer, and Rear Speakers
Front view of LG Soundbar S90TR

Front view of LG Soundbar S90TR's side corner
Angled view of LG Soundbar S90TR's back

features.d: Experience cinema-quality sound at home with the LG S90TR Dolby Atmos 7.1.3 soundbar.
Multiple speaker channels create a three-dimensional soundstage that places audio all around and above you.

features.a: LG Soundbar and LG TV in a black room playing a musical performance. White droplets representing soundwaves shoot upwards and forward from the soundbar. A subwoofer is creating a sound effect from the bottom.
features.d: A dedicated center up-firing channel delivers dialogue with pinpoint precision while height effects fill the room from above.
Three distinct vertical sound layers—floor, mid, and ceiling—create a precisely defined 3D audio environment.

features.a: LG Soundbar, LG TV, rear speakers and a subwoofer are in a living room of a skyscraper, playing a musical performance. White soundwaves made up of droplets project from the soundbar, looping around the sofa and living space. A subwoofer is creating a sound effect from the bottom. Dolby Atmos logo DTS X logo
features.d: Seven channels of immersive surround sound plus a subwoofer and three height channels deliver 570W of total output power.
Wireless rear speakers surround you with sound, requiring just a single power cable for effortless setup.
Control your soundbar directly from your LG TV with WOW Interface for seamless volume, sound mode, and settings management.
AI Room Calibration Pro analyzes your room acoustics and automatically adjusts audio settings for the perfect sound in any environment.
Enjoy Dolby Atmos and DTS:X content rendered across all 7.1.3 channels for a truly immersive home theater experience.
AI Sound Pro intelligently analyzes audio content and optimizes the sound profile automatically for every scene.

features.a: LG Soundbar and LG TV are shown together. A racing car game is displayed on screen. \t
features.d: Game Mode delivers low-latency audio with enhanced bass and spatial positioning to give you a competitive edge.

features.d: Internal parts made with recycled plastic reflect LG's commitment to more sustainable product design.

features.a: A pictogram shows plastic bottles with the word \
features.d: The soundbar grille fabric is certified by the Global Recycled Standard and made from reclaimed plastic bottles.

features.a: A movie plays on an LG OLED TV and LG Soundbar in a modern city apartment in a side angle view. White beads depicting sound waves project upwards and downwards from the Soundbar and TV, creating a dome of sound in the space.  Dolby Atmos logo DTS X logo
features.d: Full support for Dolby Atmos and DTS:X object-based audio formats for the ultimate immersive sound experience.

specs.Audio Formats: Dolby Atmos, DTS:X, Dolby TrueHD, DTS-HD Master Audio
